close_reason: Per-crate error wording is more helpful than generic wording
description: secretx-env/src/lib.rs:32-37 The 'expected backend env, got X' check is duplicated verbatim across every backend (compare secretx-file/src/lib.rs:50-55). This is a candidate for a small helper in secretx-core: fn check_backend(parsed: &SecretUri, expected: &'static str) -> Result<(), SecretError>. Filed as opinion-tier — the duplication is small (5 lines x 30 backends ≈ 150 lines workspace-wide) and the helper would not eliminate the per-crate parse() call, just unify the wording. Cross-crate refactor; filed under env for visibility.
title: Backend-mismatch error wording is per-crate, not extracted
